calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-15-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Alabaster for petitioner Arleen Kwan.

The Court stated there were issues with inclusion of LLCs not in wxistence at the time of the creation of the trust or taken in the name of the trust, as well as a promissory note and deed of trust on a property deeded out of the trust. Mr. Alabaster stated that Mr. Kwan intended to correct the status of the promissory note as he was preparing a new deed to transfer the property, but that the recording of the deed would have created complications with the related 1031 exchange which was ready to close. He added that, unfortunately, Mr. Wong had then died before he could proceed with his plan to record the deed, but that the deed was evidence of his intent that the property be included in the trust. Regarding the LLCs, Mr. Alabaster conceeded that they were never expressly included in the trust. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
